name: @plannotator/pi-extension
description: Plannotator extension for Pi coding agent - interactive plan review with visual annotation
author: backnotprop

scripts.build:
cp ../hook/dist/index.html plannotator.html && cp ../hook/dist/review.html review-editor.html && mkdir -p generated && for f in feedback-templates review-core storage draft project pr-provider pr-github pr-gitlab checklist integrations-common repo reference-common favicon resolve-file; do src="../../packages/shared/$f.ts"; printf '// @generated — DO NOT EDIT. Source: packages/shared/%s.ts
' "$f" | cat - "$src" > "generated/$f.ts"; done && mkdir -p generated/ai/providers && for f in index types provider session-manager endpoints context base-session; do src="../../packages/ai/$f.ts"; printf '// @generated — DO NOT EDIT. Source: packages/ai/%s.ts
' "$f" | cat - "$src" > "generated/ai/$f.ts"; done && for f in claude-agent-sdk codex-sdk opencode-sdk pi-sdk pi-sdk-node pi-events; do src="../../packages/ai/providers/$f.ts"; printf '// @generated — DO NOT EDIT. Source: packages/ai/providers/%s.ts
' "$f" | cat - "$src" > "generated/ai/providers/$f.ts"; done
